codeReview.summary: Commit 1a9ed12d only tuned client defaults and added config-focused regression assertions. Its own handoff shows the feature did not yet satisfy the end-to-end benchmark contract at that time, but later validated evidence supersedes that earlier failure: the exact benchmark now completes with substantive, instance-attributed output on the same localhost proxy/client configuration surface this feature established.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The mission library needed to be updated to reflect the committed OpenCode client baseline after this feature landed: `.opencode/config.json` is normalized to `http://127.0.0.1:4000/v1`, no longer carries `prompt_settings.settings_file`, and still references a missing local `./config.schema.json` file.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .opencode/config.json now contains `agent.api_endpoint: http://127.0.0.1:4000/v1`, `prompt_settings.default_mode: default`, and no `settings_file`; `.opencode/` directory listing shows no `config.schema.json`; these points are now captured in `.factory/library/environment.md`.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The worker correctly treated bounded 529 loop-breaker evidence as a remaining blocker rather than success. Later fixes confirm that scrutiny must judge this feature against the newest benchmark evidence rather than freezing it at its original handoff result.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Worker handoff 2026-03-30T06:34:28.349Z records explicit 529 empty-visible retry-loop breakers and marks the end-to-end benchmark incomplete; mission features.json for `scrutiny-validator-session-stability` adds an orchestrator note that earlier fallback/apology evidence has been superseded by later fixes and the passing transcript in `/tmp/deliver-actionable-benchmark-transcript-run.jsonl`; that transcript now shows structured actionable output.

summary: Reviewed the original handoff, transcript skeleton, commit 1a9ed12d, mission contract, and newer benchmark evidence. The feature now passes scrutiny because its client-config/session-default changes remain coherent and are validated by the later successful exact-prompt transcript, which supersedes the earlier 529-only benchmark outcome.
